name: clinical-note-card
title: Clinical Note Card
description: A clinical note (SOAP / progress / consult) as a card — author avatar, note type, timestamp, a status badge, and a lock affordance whose Tooltip carries the signature. Drafts are visually distinct.

props.name: author
props.type: { name: string; role?: ReactNode; avatarSrc?: string }

props.name: signedBy
props.description: Signature line disclosed via a Tooltip on the lock.

props.name: clamp
props.description: Clamp the body to N lines.

clinicalNotes: Signed vs. draft is a medico-legal distinction, not a style choice: draft notes render with a dashed border and a pen icon whose Tooltip warns they are not part of the legal record, while signed notes expose the full attestation (who/when) on hover. Status uses the shared badge tones (signed=success, draft=warning, addendum=info). Use `clamp` in dense chart views and pair it with a 'View full note' action so nothing is truncated without a way to read it.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Feeds the Patient Chart and Telehealth blocks.
